Variables.Name: UseMask
Variables.Description: When checked, foliage will be masked from this mesh using this color channel

Variables.Name: MaskThreshold
Variables.Description: Specifies the threshold value above which the static mesh vertex color value must be, in order for foliage instances to be placed in a specific area

Variables.Name: InvertMask
Variables.Description:
When unchecked, foliage instances will be placed only when the vertex color in the specified channel(s) is above the threshold amount.
	   When checked, the vertex color must be less than the threshold amount
